title: Four Immigrant Workers Burned to Death in Italy
summary_full: The immigrants had been working as fruit pickers in southern Italy, the authorities said, apparently as part of a system of criminal labor trafficking.
summary_public: The immigrants had been working as fruit pickers in southern Italy, the authorities said, apparently as part of a system of criminal labor trafficking.

IT.label: negative
IT.evidence: Immigrant Workers Burned to Death in Italy
